heading: Assistance to the Republic of the Philippines
label: 1731 Assistance to the Republic of the Philippines
text: The President is authorized to assist the Republic of the Philippines in fulfilling its responsibility in providing medical care and treatment for Commonwealth Army veterans and new Philippine Scouts in need of such care and treatment for service-connected disabilities and non-service-connected disabilities under certain conditions.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 1731 was renumbered .section 3531 of this title

Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 631 of this title1981— inserted “in fulfilling its responsibility” after “The President is authorized to assist the Republic of the Philippines”.Pub. L. 97–72
